trade.summary: The Stati Uniti is one of the EAU's largest trading partners. The Stati Uniti exports aircraft, vehicles, machinery, weapons, and agricultural products to the EAU. The EAU exports crude oil and re-exports goods. Dubai is the largest re-export hub for Stati Uniti goods entering the Middle East and Africa. The EAU is the Stati Uniti's largest Arab export market.
disputes: Stati Uniti concerns over EAU-Cina ties (Huawei, military facility)
Stati Uniti arms sales conditions (F-35 linked to Huawei cancellation)

diplomatic.summary: The EAU-Stati Uniti relationship is one of America's most important Arab partnerships, anchored by the Stati Uniti military presence and decades of security cooperation. Relations have been complicated by EAU's refusal to fully align with Stati Uniti positions on Cina (Huawei 5G, military facility at Khalifa Port) and Russia (Ucraina sanctions). The EAU sees itself as a hedge-power and resists full Western alignment. Nonetheless, the relationship remains fundamentally strong.
recent_incidents: EAU abstained on UN Russia-Ucraina resolutions
2021 Huawei 5G contract cancelled under Stati Uniti pressure
2021 suspension of F-35 sale discussions over Chinese ties

military.summary: The Stati Uniti maintains approximately 3,500 military personnel at Al Dhafra Air Base in Abu Dhabi, a key facility for Gulf operations. CENTCOM coordinates closely with EAU armed forces. EAU is one of the largest buyers of Stati Uniti defense equipment (F-16 fighters, THAAD, Patriot missiles). The F-35 sale (~$23B package) remains in limbo pending EAU Huawei resolution. Stati Uniti-EAU conduct regular joint exercises.
incidents: F-35 sale suspended 2021 pending Chinese technology concerns

financial.summary: The Stati Uniti dollar peg anchors EAU monetary policy to the Federal Reserve. Stati Uniti banks (JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Citi) dominate EAU investment banking. ADIA has massive Stati Uniti equity and real estate holdings. Stati Uniti private equity firms (KKR, Blackstone, Apollo) are deeply embedded in EAU sovereign fund investment programs. Stati Uniti-EAU financial integration is extremely deep.

energy.summary: The Stati Uniti is now itself a major oil and LNG exporter, reducing its energy dependence on Gulf imports. However, Stati Uniti companies (ExxonMobil, Occidental) retain equity stakes in EAU upstream production. Chevron was awarded an ADNOC upstream concession. Stati Uniti-EAU energy relations have evolved from dependency to partnership.

scientific.summary: Extensive scientific and educational collaboration. NYU Abu Dhabi is a flagship joint institution. MIT, Cornell (Weill Medical College in Qatar shared programs), and other Stati Uniti universities have EAU partnerships. EAU's AI ambitions (TII, Mohamed Bin Zayed University of AI) rely heavily on Stati Uniti-trained researchers. Space cooperation through NASA-EAU collaborations.
